Impressum.title: Legal Notice
Impressum.description: Legal details and contact information for GoldHelwah GmbH at a glance.
Impressum.complianceNoticeDescription: The following fields intentionally mark data that should not be invented. Before publishing, legal form, representation, and tax details must be completed with verified information.

sections.title: Responsible for content
sections.lines: [Add responsible person according to applicable media law]

sections.title: Website note
lines: The website presents collections, real product imagery, and contact options from GoldHelwah GmbH.
Personal consultation and product inquiries remain at the center of the experience.

Impressum.disclaimerText: Please review and update these details regularly so they reflect the current legal status of the company.

Privacy.title: Privacy information
Privacy.description: This page explains how data is processed when visiting the website or sending a contact request.
Privacy.intro: We only process data to the extent required to display the website, remember the language preference, and handle inquiries.

sections.title: 1. Responsible party
paragraphs: The responsible party is GoldHelwah GmbH, Breite Straße 9, 66115 Saarbrücken, phone +49 173 5371225, email info@goldhelwah.de.
Once the final details are available, the legal notice and privacy page should be aligned.

sections.title: 2. Technical connection data
paragraphs: When visiting the website, technically necessary data such as IP address, time, browser type, and requested content may be processed.
This processing serves the secure and stable delivery of the website.

sections.title: 3. Contact inquiries
paragraphs: If you use the contact form or reach out by phone, your data will only be used to handle your inquiry.
The exact data required depends on the occasion and product interest.

sections.title: 4. Language and cookies
paragraphs: The website supports multiple languages. A language preference may be stored for technical reasons.
This is used only to show the website in the selected language on later visits.

sections.title: 5. Inquiries and communication
paragraphs: The website can be used to send product inquiries and consultation requests to GoldHelwah GmbH.
If communication channels or connected services change, this page should be updated accordingly.

Privacy.noticeText: Please update this information whenever contact channels, services, or processing steps change.
